mapper.select: select c.id, c.total, c.user_id, ci.id as item_id, ci.quantity, ci.total as item_total, p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, p.price as product_price, p.pic as product_pic from cart c left join cartitem ci on c.id = ci.cart_id left join product p on ci.product_id = p.id where c.user_id = #{userId}

select c.id, c.total, c.user_id, ci.id as item_id, ci.quantity, ci.total as item_total, p.id as product_id, p.name as product_name, p.price as product_price, p.pic as product_pic from cart c left join cartitem ci on c.id = ci.cart_id left join product p on ci.product_id = p.id where c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update cart set total = #{cartTotal} where id = #{cartId}
